description: [Shared] Add suppressContactNotifications?: boolean and suppressInternalNotifications?: boolean to UpdateTicketInTransactionOptions (optimizedTicketActions.ts:2308), default false
[Shared] Server validation rejects suppressInternalNotifications=true unless suppressContactNotifications=true (both action paths)
[Shared] updateTicketWithCache/updateTicketInTransaction accept and thread the two flags to the event-publish step
[Shared] Mirror path updateTicket in ticketActions.ts accepts and threads the two flags identically
[Shared] TICKET_CLOSED published payload includes both suppression flags (optimizedTicketActions.ts:2734 + ticketActions mirror)
[Shared] TICKET_UPDATED published payload includes both suppression flags (optimizedTicketActions.ts:2790 + mirror)
[Shared] TICKET_ASSIGNED published payload includes both suppression flags (optimizedTicketActions.ts:2769 + mirror)
[Shared] Extend ticketClosed/ticketUpdated/ticketAssigned Zod payload schemas (ticketEventSchemas.ts) with the two optional boolean fields, default false; legacy payloads still validate
[Shared] Flags are a no-op (ignored, not errored) when nothing contact-facing is affected; they just propagate
[Shared] NotificationAccumulator carries the suppression flags through accumulation into handleAccumulatedTicketUpdates without disturbing dedup keys
[Shared] Outbound webhook payloads (ticket.closed, ticket.updated) include both suppression flags and still deliver
[Shared] Workflow event on the default channel carries the flags in payload (eventBus/index.ts:786-824 conversion preserves them)
[Shared] writeTicketActivity records suppression metadata on the close/update activity entry
[Shared] Timeline UI renders a muted 'silent' annotation on close/update entries carrying suppression metadata
[Shared] Client-portal update/close paths strip/reject the flags for client users (TicketDetailsContainer client wrapper + client-portal actions)
[A] handleTicketClosed skips primary contact/client close email and bundle-child requester emails on contact suppression
[A] handleTicketClosed skips assignee, additional-agent, internal-watcher emails on internal suppression, and external-watcher emails on contact suppression
[A] surveySubscriber skips the survey invitation on contact suppression (TICKET_CLOSED)
[A] internalNotificationSubscriber skips client-portal contact notification on contact suppression and staff in-app on internal suppression (TICKET_CLOSED case)
[A] Bundle master close propagates the suppression flags to child-ticket closes
[B] handleTicketUpdated skips the ticket-updated-client contact/client send (:1416) on contact suppression
[B] handleAccumulatedTicketUpdates skips the ticket-updated-client contact send (:1820) on contact suppression
[B] TICKET_UPDATED external-watcher client send (:1483) skipped on contact suppression; internal assignee/additional/internal-watcher sends skipped on internal suppression

[B] TICKET_ASSIGNED contact sends (team-assignment client :2136, first individual :2156, watcher team :2232) gated on contact suppression; internal assignment notifications gated on internal suppression
[B] internalNotificationSubscriber applies the same contact/internal gating for the TICKET_UPDATED case
[A/B] Reusable two-level suppression control component (contact checkbox + indented internal checkbox with coupling, helper text, kebab-case ids, i18n)
[A/B] Suppression control added to the entry hero (TicketInfo) Save/Cancel bar; values threaded into handleBatchSaveChanges → updateTicketWithCache options
[A/B] Suppression control added to the grid hero (BentoHero) Save/Cancel bar; values threaded into the batched save
[A/B] Suppression control unchecked on every open (no sticky state) in all surfaces
[B] Suppression control added to BulkChangeStatusDialog
[B] Suppression control added to BulkChangePriorityDialog
[B] Suppression control added to BulkAssignTicketsDialog
[B] Suppression control added to BulkSetDueDateDialog
[B] Suppression control added to the inline 'Move to Board' dialog (TicketingDashboard.tsx:2306-2420)
[B] BulkAddTagsDialog intentionally gets NO suppression control (publishes no ticket-update event) — documented
[B] Each bulk route-client threads the flags from its dialog into the bulk action (status/priority/assign/due-date/move)
[B] bulkUpdateTicketStatus/Priority/DueDate, bulkAssignTickets, moveTicketsToBoard forward the flags into updateTicketInTransaction/updateTicketWithCache for every ticket in the batch
[A] Migration adds suppress_contact_notifications and suppress_internal_notifications boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false to board_auto_close_rules
[A] closeRuleActions read/write/validate the two new rule fields (internal implies contact)
[A] Auto-close rule settings UI exposes the two suppression toggles
[A] autoCloseTicketsHandler passes the rule's suppression flags into the ticket close call
[A] Auto-close pre-close warning email is skipped when the rule sets suppress_contact_notifications
[C] Add third closeStatusId argument to BentoTimelineTile.onAddNewComment (:70) and TicketBentoLayout.onAddNewComment (:112), matching TicketConversation (:73)
[C] TicketDetails threads closedStatusOptions (:413-425) into TicketBentoLayout → BentoTimelineTile
[C] Grid Resolution lane renders a 'Close status' select populated from closedStatusOptions
[C] Grid resolution send with a chosen close status closes the ticket via handleAddNewComment close path (sets metadata.closes_ticket, moves status_id)
[C] Resolution-close honors close-rule validation (validateTicketClosure.ts:94-107)
[C] Grid Resolution lane exposes the two-level suppression control; a silent resolution-close threads flags into the close status update / TICKET_CLOSED event
[C] Entry TicketConversation resolution composer gains the same suppression control for parity
[C] With no close status selected, a resolution comment records is_resolution and does not change status (grid + entry unchanged)
[D] Port pendingChanges/originalTicketValues diff (self-cleaning handlePendingChange) to BentoHero, replacing commitField/flushPending 700ms auto-commit
[D] Grid hero derives hasUnsavedChanges and registers useRegisterUnsavedChanges nav guard
[D] Grid hero renders a Save Changes/Cancel bar (appears only when dirty) with a discard confirmation dialog
[D] Grid board select clears status_id, category_id, subcategory_id (and priority_id when new board's priority type differs)
[D] Grid hero loads board-scoped statuses (getTicketStatuses) and categories (getTicketCategoriesByBoard) for the pending/effective board
[D] Grid hero renders a Category picker (new) from the effective board; today category is only in the All-fields drawer
[D] requiresDestinationStatusSelection gate: warning + disabled Save until a status for the new board is chosen
[D] Grid Save persists all pending fields in one batched handleBatchSaveChanges write; on success clears pending buffers and advances originalTicketValues
[D] Grid hero ports save keyboard shortcut and onLiveDirtyFieldsChange dirty-field reporting for parity
[D] Grid live-conflict 'take theirs' for board clears coupled fields (board_id, status_id, category_id, subcategory_id)
[Platform] All new UI strings use i18n keys; pseudo-locale generation + validation pass
[Platform] All new interactive elements have kebab-case ids
[Platform] Subscriber gate points log a one-line 'skipped due to suppression' at existing debug level
[Platform] v1 REST API update/close endpoint (if present) accepts the optional flags; else documented N/A in SCRATCHPAD
[Platform] event_catalog payload schema for the three ticket events updated if the catalog stores schemas; else documented N/A
[Platform] Default behavior unchanged with flags off: close/update/assign produce the exact pre-change notification set (regression-guarded)
